audit_items.proof_trace: `s_entered` is set to `true` at line 418 before all three external calls (safeTransfer L444, auctionCallback L449, safeTransferFrom L453), so any re-entry to `bid()` hits the check at L415 and reverts with `ReentrantCall()`.
